title: Men of Ireland
writer: Donal O'Cahill, Patrick K. Heale, John Duffy
actors: Cecil F. Ford, Eileen Curran, Brian O'Sullivan
plot: A young medical student visits the Blasket Islands, off the coast of Ireland, during the holidays and becomes charmed with the place and its people. He falls in love with a local girl, who is betrothed to a local man. The two men mee
